equation: gps_accel=d(GPS_speed)/dt by local linear fit; vector_accel=d(GPS ground velocity)/dt from speed/course; apparent_coeff=-mass*gps_accel/speed^2
note: GPS ground-speed/course dynamics only. Wind, attitude, vertical motion, and horizontal propulsive force are unknown; apparent drag coefficients are diagnostic, not fitted CdA.
Acceleration is scalar GPS speed slope; vector fields use GPS speed/course. Apparent decel coefficient assumes no horizontal propulsive force and is not a physical drag fit.
